items.title: Cyprus leader calls for frank discussion on 'colonial' UK bases
items.dek: The UK's two military bases on Cyprus are a "colonial consequence" on the island, says President Nikos Christodoulides.
items.body: The UK's two military bases on Cyprus are a "colonial consequence" on the island, says President Nikos Christodoulides.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Japan PM to hold 'difficult' talks with Trump as Iran conflict looms large
items.dek: It comes days after Trump criticised Japan for not answering his demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.body: It comes days after Trump criticised Japan for not answering his demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kevin Spacey and accusers settle before civil trial
items.dek: The actor agrees an out-of-court settlement with three men who accused him of sexual assault.
items.body: The actor agrees an out-of-court settlement with three men who accused him of sexual assault.
items.author: IriLine Desk
